question: What historical origin of the Freedom Party of Austria (FPO) motivated anti-FPO protesters' nighttime demonstrations, and what specific messages were conveyed on their banners?
answer: The FPO was founded seven decades ago under a former Nazi lawmaker, motivating protesters to display banners reading "LASST NAZIS NICHT REGIEREN UND NIEMALS AUFMARSCHIEREN!" (Don't let Nazis govern and never let them march) and "KEINE NAZIS IN DER HOFBURG!" (No Nazis in the Hofburg).

video: A group of protesters holds a banner reading "LASST NAZIS NICHT REGIEREN UND NIEMALS AUFMARSCHIEREN!" at a nighttime demonstration.
A woman holds a sign saying "KEINE NAZIS IN DER HOFBURG!" during a protest gathering.
text: The FPO was founded seven decades ago under a former Nazi lawmaker and has worked to moderate its image.
